expectations.text: Audit file is written to the plan folder (docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/) — not just printed to stdout
expectations.evidence: Agent saved to workspace output path only. No indication it wrote to docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/

expectations.text: Output contains YAML frontmatter with a 'verdict' field set to READY, NEEDS REVISION, or NOT READY
expectations.evidence: Output starts with '# Plan Audit: ux-discovery-v2 / Date: 2026-06-26 | Auditor: Claude Code' — plain Markdown header, no YAML frontmatter

expectations.text: Prior art section references the expired ui-ux-discovery plan and mentions at least one specific prior finding (e.g., 269 raw hex values, 48 dead CSS classes, or token inventory)
expectations.evidence: Prior art files confirmed to exist, but no specific prior findings (269 hex, 48 dead classes, etc.) cited in the output

expectations.text: Gate coverage table or section is present and correctly marks all 3 discovery sprints as N/A for code-modifying gates
expectations.evidence: No gate coverage section found. Output uses a 'What was checked' table focused on structural completeness, not code-gate compliance

expectations.text: Session start compliance is assessed — output mentions whether each sprint has a build-current-state.sh step
expectations.evidence: No mention of session start steps, build-current-state.sh, or verify-tooling-state.sh. The two issues with UX2-R2 and UX2-R3 missing these were not caught

expectations.text: Any scripts referenced in the sprint files are verified against the actual scripts/agent/ directory contents (not assumed to exist)
expectations.evidence: All scripts (build-current-state.sh, verify-tooling-state.sh, code-query.sh with hardcoded-tokens and duplicate-controls modes) confirmed present

expectations.text: Blocking issues section is present — either lists specific issues with evidence and fix, or explicitly states zero blocking issues with a reason
expectations.evidence: Found 1 real blocking issue: wrong path in UX2-R1 (missing 'plan/' segment in src-structure-refactor reference). Specific file and fix cited.
